name: Desview T17 Teleprompter Set with 17 Inch Reversing Monitor for Broadcast Recording
description: Record professional scripted presentations or broadcast video with this T17 Teleprompter Set from Desview thanks to its 17" monitor and 70/30 beamsplitter glass.

features.Key Features :: 70/30 Beamsplitter Glass | 17" Self-Reversing Monitor | 1280 x 1024 Resolution | Height-Adjustable PTZ Mount | HDMI, AV, BNC, VGA, USB Type-A Inputs | Remote, Foot Pedal, and App Control | Supports Windows Operating Systems | Teleprompter Hood, Video Cables
features.What's in The Box :: Desview T17 Teleprompter Set with 17" Self-Reversing Monitor | Display (17") | Beamsplitter Combo Frame | Teleprompter Hood | L-Shaped Pallet | Display Tray | PTZ Mount | Remote Control | Bluetooth Adapter | Foot Pedal | VGA Cable | USB Cable | HDMI Cable | Dongle | Storage Case
